explanation: The command uses a renamed tar.exe (not_tar.exe) with short-form flags (-x for extract, -f for file) instead of long-form flags. This mutation preserves the original behavior while altering the command structure.

The command uses a renamed tar.exe (not_tar.exe) with a compressed archive (.tar.gz) and short-form flags (-x for extract, -f for file). This variation tests the rule's ability to detect different archive types.

The command uses a renamed tar.exe (not_tar.exe) with long-form flags (--extract and --file) and a different archive type (.tar.bz2). This tests the rule's detection capability with various archive formats.
